span.p: Deployment View: Browser Memory Daemon - Daily-driver local

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Calls authenticated read,
admin, media, and forget APIs
on

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Reads and writes metadata,
FTS, tasks, audit, and
receipts in

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Leases and updates media
tasks in

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Reads and writes text
snapshots in

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Stores, serves, purges, and
rehydrates media blobs in

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Posts /capture,
/visit-events, media
metadata, and raw blob
uploads to

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Captures visible page text,
media references, tab
lifecycle events, and
browser-side media bytes from
Windows Chrome; queues work
durably and posts to the WSL
daemon.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Static browser UI for exact
search, recent/timeline
views, document/snapshot
detail, media artifact
opening, policy rules,
doctor, and forget-domain
operations.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Authenticated loopback HTTP
API that handles capture,
visit events, media artifact
upload/fetch/purge, exact
search,
recent/timeline/detail,
policy rules, doctor, forget,
and static UI serving.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Long-running systemd user
worker that leases
daemon-public media fetch
tasks, fetches public
media/HLS without Chrome
cookies, classifies terminal
states, and updates artifact
rows.

div.style: color: rgb(68, 68, 68) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Durable relational and
full-text store for migration
ledger, sources, documents,
visits, visit events,
snapshots, chunks,
chunks_fts, media artifacts,
media fetch tasks, policy
rules, audit events, and
deletion receipts.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Filesystem store for snapshot
text blobs under the
configured WSL-visible blob
root.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Bounded and disposable
filesystem cache for stored
image/video/audio blobs under
the configured WSL-visible
blob root, with
purge/rehydrate semantics
that preserve media refs,
hashes, status reasons, and
provenance when bytes are
absent or purged.
